user.title: Set up NBE V16 Pellet Boiler
user.description: Enter the IP address and TCP port of the EP20 module. Home Assistant will connect as a TCP client to the EP20 Telnet port and passively read the UART data stream. The EP20 factory configuration remains unchanged.

data_description.host: IP address of the EP20 module, e.g. 192.168.1.100
data_description.port: Telnet port of the EP20 module (default: 23)

error.host_required: Please enter the IP address of the EP20 module.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the EP20 module at the given IP address and TCP port.
